description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named deploy. Add a test1 job in the deploy stage that runs in parallel using a matrix: PROVIDER set to aws with STACK values monitoring, app1, app2; PROVIDER set to ovh with STACK values monitoring, backup, app; PROVIDER set to gcp and vultr with STACK values data, processing. Each parallel instance executes the shell command bin/deploy. Add a test2 job also in the deploy stage with the identical parallel matrix, runs bin/deploy, and defines a variable RESULT equal to $PROVIDER/$STACK for each job instance.
